changeSet.sql: insert into account (account_number, currency_code, is_blocked, balance) values ('810123456', 'RUB', false, 0)
insert into account (account_number, currency_code, is_blocked, balance) values ('810123457', 'RUB', false, 0)
insert into account (account_number, currency_code, is_blocked, balance) values ('810123458', 'RUB', false, 0)
